dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.upgrade_warning:
⚠ VERY IMPORTANT WARNING!

Are you sure you want to upgrade the semester? This will:
1. Archive all active student courses as completed.
2. Delete current timetable and exam schedules.
3. Upgrade student levels if transitioning to a new academic year.
4. Students must register manually for the new semester.

This action cannot be undone. Do you wish to proceed?
dashboard.upgrade_desc: Upgrading will increase semester number by 1, archive currently registered student courses as completed, and clear the timetable/exam schedule.
